parties.name: SUZUKI-VIDALON, MAMI 1826 32ND AVE SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94122

calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jun-24-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mami Suzuki Vidalon in propria persona.

Mrs. Vidalon stated that she has not spoken with an attorney and that she will be asking a friend to assist her. The court stated that there are many procedural issues and that even if all the issues were fixed, it does not know if Mrs. Vidalon will get anywhere because the decedent left specific instructions that the property is to go into the trust, and that this is not the proper petition. The court explained the purpose of a spousal property petition as well as other types of petitions that are used to bring a property into a trust. Mrs. Vidalon stated that Coinbase cannot identify beneficiaries because beneficiary designation is not an option, that Coinbase is requesting probate letters and that there is about $60,000.00 in the Coinbase account. The court explained the purpose and the function of a Small Estate Affidavit under Probate Code 13100. The Petition for Spousal Property is off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.
